payload.label: side table
payload.short_description: dark wooden side table with shelf
payload.long_description: Low dark-brown wooden side table with a rectangular top, thick square legs and a lower shelf holding a woven basket; top surface bears a potted trailing plant, a white coaster and small items; object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m) and is slightly edge-cropped at the top-right of the crop.

message.content: {"label":"side table","short_description":"dark wooden side table with shelf","long_description":"Low dark-brown wooden side table with a rectangular top, thick square legs and a lower shelf holding a woven basket; top surface bears a potted trailing plant, a white coaster and small items; object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m) and is slightly edge-cropped at the top-right of the crop.","attributes":["dark brown wood finish","rectangular top","thick square legs","lower shelf present","woven basket on shelf","potted trailing plant on top","small objects on surface (coaster/remote)","slightly edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
